expectations.text: Grounds the advice in the project plan: cites specific, accurate details from clearcontract_project_plan.md (phases, schema, architecture decisions, or the Out of Scope list)
expectations.evidence: Cites Out of Scope section 9, /q/[token] and /i/[token] pages, PocketBase collections/API rules, and Phases 3-8.

expectations.text: Notices that customer accounts/logins are explicitly deferred in the plan's Out of Scope list (section 9)
expectations.evidence: "your own plan already made this call — 'customer accounts/logins' is explicitly in the Out of Scope list in section 9."

expectations.text: Presents at least two genuine alternatives to the user's proposal (a defended 'defer / do nothing' counts as one)
expectations.evidence: Park it (defer); customer-scoped token page /c/[token]; magic-link upgrade later; full login portal implicitly the third.

expectations.text: Commits to a single clear recommendation rather than a neutral pros/cons list
expectations.evidence: "My recommendation: park it. Ship through Phase 8... build the token-based customer page first" with a concrete trigger signal.

expectations.text: Weighs build cost concretely for a solo part-time developer (time estimates or specific complexity costs like new collections/hooks)
expectations.evidence: "easily a phase-sized chunk of work (a week+)" for the portal; "maybe a day or two of work" for the token page.

notes: Did not check git/build state; no offer to record the decision durably (offered a plan-doc edit instead).
